stemHtml: How does motivation affect an individual completing a task?

options.a: Motivation influences the efficiency achieved but has no affect over arousal level and the consequent level of performance.
options.b: Motivation only affects the time taken by an individual to complete a task.
options.c: Motivation reflects the difference between what an individual can do and what the individual will do.
options.d: Motivation has no influence on how an individual performs.
